---
name: Feature Request / Symptom Suggestion
about: New VSS effect, new slider, or UX improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

Brief description of the desired feature.

## Clinical Context (for new symptoms)

If this is about a new VSS symptom or adjusting an existing effect,
please cite a source:

- **Study / source:** <PubMed link, DOI, or peer-reviewed paper>
- **Symptom prevalence:** <e.g. "reported by 67 % of VSS patients in Puledda 2020">
- **Visual description:** <how do affected people perceive this?>

## Use Case

Who benefits? Awareness, screening, playability?

## Possible Implementation

If you have an idea of how the effect could look:

```
Pseudo-code or GLSL sketch
```

## Alternatives

Have you considered other approaches?

## Willing to help?

- [ ] I'd like to open a PR for this myself
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] Suggestion only — someone else should implement
